data.content:
The file is generated successfully but never added to the `Compile` item group. SDK-style projects resolve globs at **evaluation time** (before targets run), so the file generated during the build is invisible to the compiler.

**Fix:** Add the generated file to `<Compile>` and `<FileWrites>` inside the target.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation and register for Clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target runs `BeforeTargets="CoreCompile;BeforeCompile"` and generates the file, but it never adds the generated file to the `Compile` item group. Since SDK-style projects resolve their `Compile` items via globbing at evaluation time (before any targets run), the generated file isn't picked up.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group within the target, and also register it with `FileWrites` so it gets cleaned properly.

Let me use the including-generated-files skill since it's specifically for this scenario.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation and register for Clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
**Root cause:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target wrote the `.cs` file to `obj/` during the build, but never added it to the `Compile` item group. SDK-style projects expand file globs at **evaluation time** (before any targets execute), so the late-generated file was invisible to Roslyn.

**Fix:** Added two lines inside the target's `<ItemGroup>`:
- `<Compile Include="...">` — tells the compiler about the generated file
- `<FileWrites Include="...">` — registers it for cleanup by `dotnet clean`
